upgrade_source: Brooklyn Reporter (November 2020); MTA press release; MTA Flickr photos
notes: Three ADA-accessible elevators: one mezzanine-to-street, two mezzanine-to-platform. $55.2 million contract awarded late 2018. Originally expected July 2020, delayed to November 6, 2020. Mezzanine expanded, new stairs, PA system, and fire alarms also installed.
